testcase.name: Night After Night Engine - E2E Tests › Pathway 1: Pre-order → Payment → Session Creation → Guest Tracker
Night After Night Engine - E2E Tests › Pathway 2: Session → Order → Delivery → Active (Night After Night Flow)
Night After Night Engine - E2E Tests › Pathway 3: Payment Confirmation Triggers Hookah Tracker Redirect
Night After Night Engine - E2E Tests › Pathway 4: Full Night After Night Flow - Pre-order to Active Session
Night After Night Engine - E2E Tests › Pathway 5: Guest Experience - Payment → Tracker → Session Status Updates
